[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 157/26
221200 UTC JUL
POLISH NAV WARN 157/2026
SOUTHERN BALTIC. POLISH COAST
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:

S-6 CENTERED 54-39.27N 016-36.59E

ON 2026-07-22 FROM 12:00 TO 16:00
ON 2026-07-23 FROM 12:00 TO 16:00
TIME IN UTC.
ZONE IS CLOSED
CANCEL THIS MSG 231600 UTC JUL
